notes: Run 6 (2026-07-21): diffed against the Run 5 SHA (a3bbcccd, 2026-07-20T13:10Z) to current staging HEAD (762f7f46, 2026-07-21T11:23Z). Six commits touched webapp/ (or its immediate backend) in range: 696f99832e (2026-07-20T10:25Z, BEFORE a3bbcccd chronologically — already accounted for by Run 5, not re-analyzed), ba609fe444 'fail-safe provisioning + no-sweep archived strategies', bc910ad56f + 4a679a9 'read-only sudo impersonation for admins' (#1908), adc49c2e46 'setup-aware status for farming strategies', e3f348d6d7 'report provisioning failure honestly + robust day-trade agent resolution', 699dc7fd9d 'rich provisioning loader', 585d618098 'give strategy wallets their own section on /portfolio'. Re-verified the flag mechanism is unchanged: webapp/app/.well-known/vercel/flags/route.ts still registers exactly account-deletion (on for everyone) and yield-page (gated) — /yield stays out of scope; STRATEGY_SUB_AGENTS_ENABLED (friday/airflow/dags/friday/libs/strategy_agents/flags.py) still defaults false with no override in .devcontainer/.env.local.example or any deploy config. Classified: (1) bc910ad56f/4a679a9 admin sudo impersonation — EXCLUDED, gated behind an ADMIN_USERS allowlist (webapp/lib/admin-users.ts) and explicitly hidden from public docs/OpenAPI by its own commit; it's a support-tool feature for admins, not a normal end-user surface. (2) ba609fe444's webapp change (strategy-sidebar-status-bar.tsx 'Setup required' on resume) — EXCLUDED, it lives in the regular (chat-created/schedule) Strategy Detail Page sidebar, which is part of the STRATEGY_SUB_AGENTS_ENABLED-gated AWAITING_SETUP flow (distinct from the Farming sidebar, which adc49c2e46 changes separately and is NOT gated) — unreachable for normal users today. ba609fe444's backend 'no-sweep archived' hardening applies to Farming too (farming-teardown stop path) but matches wallet.mdx/strategies.mdx's existing Archived Strategies description from Run 4 — no doc change needed. (3) e3f348d6d7 — pure reliability fix (day-trade sub-agent resolution, honest failure reporting), no new/changed user-visible text or state — no doc gap. (4) adc49c2e46 + 699dc7fd9d (Farming strategies, NOT gated) — MISSING/OUTDATED: farming strategy status is now a 4-state pill (Inactive / Setting up… / Setup needed / Active) replacing the old simple Active/Inactive badge, and a new rich 'Setting up your strategy' provisioning loader (with an Up-next step preview: create wallet → add funds → venue setup → activate) shows before the funding checklist while the strategy's wallet is being created. Documented in strategies.mdx (Farming Strategies intro badge description; new paragraph at the top of 'Getting a strategy ready to trade'). (5) 585d618098 (Portfolio page, NOT gated) — MISSING (pre-existing gap, missed by all prior runs): the per-strategy wallet cards + archived strategies group were already rendered on /portfolio before this commit (it only restructured their placement into one 'Your Strategies' section above the venue selector), but portfolio.mdx never mentioned strategy wallets appearing on the Portfolio page at all. Added a new 'Your Strategies' section to portfolio.mdx, linking to strategies.mdx#strategy-wallets for detail. Light full sweep: diffed webapp/app/(authenticated)/* top-level routes against docs.json nav groups — all routes (app, research, market-pulse, points, polymarket, portfolio, refer-and-earn, settings, discover, activities, farming, yield, pricing) already map to an existing doc page or are out of scope (yield gated; dev/error-test is a dev-only route); no new undocumented route surfaced this run.
